message:
fix(scheduler): bounds-check observation index in Bayesian posterior update

update_posterior() previously indexed likelihoods[observation] without bounds
checking, which would panic on an out-of-range observation value. Switch to
likelihoods.get_mut(observation) so out-of-range observations are silently
ignored rather than causing a runtime panic.

New test: update_posterior_out_of_range_is_noop confirms that passing an
observation index beyond the likelihood array length does not panic and
leaves the posterior distribution unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
